appsync.resolver.appsyncruntime.CfnAbout: Describes a runtime used by an AWS AppSync resolver or AWS AppSync function. Specifies the name and version of the runtime to use. Note that if a runtime is specified, code must also be specified.

appsync.resolver.appsyncruntime.Name.Description: The `name` of the runtime to use. Currently, the only allowed value is `APPSYNC_JS`.

appsync.resolver.appsyncruntime.RuntimeV.Description: The `version` of the runtime to use. Currently, the only allowed version is `1.0.0`.
